'''tatoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalassophyte|thalassophyte]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-t-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalassophyte|thalassophyte]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tatoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæteheth|tæteheth]] || [[word:tætehej|tætehej]] || [[word:tætehesh|tætehesh]] || [[word:tætehe|tætehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tatotohoth|tatotohoth]] || [[word:tatotohoj|tatotohoj]] || [[word:tatotohosh|tatotohosh]] || [[word:tatotoho|tatotoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tatohoth|tatohoth]] || [[word:tatohoj|tatohoj]] || [[word:tatohosh|tatohosh]] || [[word:tatoho|tatoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tatofhoth|tatofhoth]] || [[word:tatofhoj|tatofhoj]] || [[word:tatofhosh|tatofhosh]] || [[word:tatofhof|tatofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tatohotho|tatohotho]] || [[word:tatohojo|tatohojo]] || [[word:tatohosho|tatohosho]] || [[word:tatohoko|tatohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tatohoth|tatohoth]] || [[word:tatohoj|tatohoj]] || [[word:tatohosh|tatohosh]] || [[word:tatoho|tatoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tatohothol|tatohothol]] || [[word:tatohojol|tatohojol]] || [[word:tatohoshol|tatohoshol]] || [[word:tatohokol|tatohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tatohothotho|tatohothotho]] || [[word:tatohojojo|tatohojojo]] || [[word:tatohoshosho|tatohoshosho]] || [[word:tatohoko|tatohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tatohothon|tatohothon]] || [[word:tatohojon|tatohojon]] || [[word:tatohoshon|tatohoshon]] || [[word:tatohokon|tatohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tatohothoro|tatohothoro]] || [[word:tatohojoro|tatohojoro]] || [[word:tatohoshoro|tatohoshoro]] || [[word:tatohokoro|tatohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
